MOVED: This file was RENAMED to roster.json on 2026-07-24.
why: The old name covered only git-teammates. The fleet roster now holds BOTH classes in one file (git-teammates + native/task-specific + retired, AND the Council/Workshop lenses). The name 'superagents' undersold it.
note: This stub is intentionally NOT the fleet data. Any tool/agent still reading superagents.json for .agents will fail loud here rather than serve a stale roster — that is by design. Update your pointer to roster.json.
